category_sources: source_facts.description says full-text search system; official dbmx.net Hyper Estraier homepage describes a full-text search system for documents, sites, mail boxes, and file servers.
display_name_sources: Official dbmx.net homepage title is "Hyper Estraier: a full-text search system for communities"; source_facts.name is hyperestraier.
docs_sources: Official dbmx.net homepage has a Documents section linking Introduction, User's Guide, Programming Guide, P2P Guide, and Crawler Guide.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official dbmx.net homepage provides source package downloads but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official dbmx.net homepage lists full-text search, intelligent web crawler, Unicode multilingualism, API, and P2P architecture; source_facts.executables lists command-line tools.
